name: skillsync
description: Cross-CLI Skill Synchronization - automatically synchronizes active agent skills, custom commands, and references across all terminal AI harnesses

source.label: Source Harness
source.description: The primary source CLI to synchronize skills from

sync_on_launch.label: Sync on Launch
sync_on_launch.description: Trigger synchronization automatically when starting a session

delete_orphans.label: Delete Orphans
delete_orphans.description: Remove skills from target harnesses when deleted from the source
